trends.headline: Max Planck Institute of Extraterrestrial Physics Makes an ‘Illuminating’ Discovery About the the Solar System’s X-Ray ‘Glow’
trends.summary: Scientists from the Max Planck Institute for Extraterrestrial Physics have successfully isolated the Solar System's ubiquitous X-ray glow.

trends.headline: Rep. Burchett says he's seen UFO videos that 'defy any reason'
trends.summary: “I've seen pictures and video of things that defy any reason that we have, and everybody says, ‘Well, it's our stuff, it's the Russians, it's the Chinese,’” he said.

trends.headline: Former Air Force vet describes seeing UAPs near base
trends.summary: "There's no way to describe these objects as anything that I've ever seen before in flight pattern," Ron Bilak said.

trends.headline: Bizarre, UFO-like halo of red light appears over small Italian town — for the second time in 3 years
trends.summary: An eerie new photo shows a giant red ring shining above Possagno, near the Italian Alps. The eye-catching image is almost identical to one taken in the same town in early 2023.

trends.headline: Watch eerie 'UFOs' and a solar 'cyclone' take shape in stunning new ESA video of the sun
trends.summary: An eerie new video from ESA's Solar Orbiter shows a towering 'cyclone' of plasma exhibiting behaviors never seen before on our sun.

trends.headline: Did people report seeing UFOs before the 20th century?
trends.summary: Are UFO sightings a 20th-century phenomena, or did people report seeing them earlier in history?

trends.headline: Earth from space: Bizarre 'pet cloud' reappears above its favorite spot in New Zealand
trends.summary: A recent satellite image captured the reemergence of a unique, UFO-like cloud, known as the "Taieri Pet," which appears above New Zealand's South Island when conditions are just right.

trends.headline: What's the best evidence we've found for alien life?
trends.summary: Don't expect an alien invasion anytime soon.
